rabbit-with-potatoes-step-by-step-comede.name: Rabbit With Potatoes, Step By Step
rabbit-with-potatoes-step-by-step-comede.original_name: Conejo con papas, paso a paso
instructions: We'll start our recipe, warming up a frying pan with enough olive oil. When it's hot, we'll add the rabbit and we'll soften or leap. When you look at it with a golden or crust, turn off and reserve.
We will cut up the pimenton, onion and tomato and then we will stick the garlic.
We will place a pint with olive oil and we will proceed to drink garlic and onion, we will drink without letting them burn.
When they are clear, we will add the peppermint and tomato and cook with low heat.
As our vegetables get cold, we'll skin our potatoes and cut them into cubes. Let's have a reservation.
Add the rabbit's pieces to the vegetable mix in the casserole, next to the white wine, some water, potatoes and we will mix.
Fitted with salt and pepper and paprika tablespoon, mix and we will let cook for 25 minutes with medium and cover heat. At 20 minutes of cooking, you'll add his cut parsley.
After minutes, she's clear and the rabbit's fluids have been reduced. If you see his light's still clear, put his fire up. Our rabbit shouldn't get cold but with a dense broth.
Cuando tenga esa textura, apaga y deja reposar.
Help and enjoy!

radicchiostone-fruit-salad.name: Radicchio–stone Fruit Salad
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 7–10 minutes. Let cool, then chop.
Combine radicchio, peaches, parsley, half of scallions, and walnuts in a large bowl. Drizzle in oil and lemon juice and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper.
Add cheese and remaining scallions, parsley, and walnuts to salad and gently toss again to combine.

ramen-bowl.name: Ramen Bowl

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

ingredients.prep: shelled and deveined, at room temperature

instructions: Make broth base: Combine water, onion, garlic, and ginger in a large stock pot and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to maintain an easy simmer for 40 minutes.

While broth simmers, fill a medium saucepan with water. Bring to a boil and reduce heat to a simmer. Lower eggs into boiling water one at a time. Cook until yolks are barely set, about 7 minutes. Remove eggs from hot water, run under cold water until cool, and peel. Halve eggs lengthwise, place on a plate, and season with salt and pepper.
Fill a large pot with water and bring to a boil in preparation for cooking noodles. Reduce heat to a simmer.

Add broth ingredients: Use a slotted spoon or long-handled strainer to remove garlic, ginger, and onion from broth in the stock pot; discard vegetables. Add soy sauce, sake, chile sauce, sugar, sesame oil, and salt; stir well. Cover the stock pot loosely and simmer for 10 to 20 minutes more.

Prepare finishing touches: Return simmering water to a boil. Cook noodles in boiling water uncovered, stirring occasionally, until noodles are tender yet firm to the bite, 1 to 3 minutes. Drain and divide noodles between 4 large bowls.
Add shrimp and scallops to simmering broth. Cook until opaque, 3 to 5 minutes.

Ladle finished broth into the bowls to barely cover noodles. Add equal amounts of shrimp and 1 scallop to the center of each bowl. Place a portion of bean sprouts on the side of each bowl. Place 2 soft-boiled egg halves, yolks-up, resting on noodles in each bowl; keep eggs above broth. Garnish each bowl with scallions.

raw-vegan-broccoli-salad.name: Raw Vegan Broccoli Salad
instructions: Mix vegan mayonnaise, agave nectar, and vinegar together in a large bowl until well blended. Add broccoli, carrots, red onion, bell peppers, raisins, and walnuts and toss to coat.
Place in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.

recipe-for-minced-meat-roll-with-cheese-.name: Recipe For Minced Meat Roll With Cheese And Ham
recipe-for-minced-meat-roll-with-cheese-.original_name: Receita de rolo de carne picada com queijo e fiambre
instructions: Peel the onion and garlic teeth, pick them finely and add them to the meat. Season with the cumin, salt and pepper and love it well.
Line a board with foil and spread over the meat. Cover with ham and cheese slices, wrap with paper and sprinkle with grated bread.
Place the roll on a tray and water with the olive oil. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for 40 minutes. Serve with tasteful accompaniment.

recipe-to-prepare-cheese-pancakes-with-b.name: Recipe To Prepare Cheese Pancakes With Blueberries
recipe-to-prepare-cheese-pancakes-with-b.original_name: Receta para preparar hot cakes de queso con arándanos
instructions: Loan ricotta cheese or pass it through the food processing machine to make it more soft and secure
En un recipiente mezcla todos los ingredientes secos
Separa las yemas de las claras y bate las claras hasta punto de nieve y reserva
En el recipiente con el queso ricotta agrega las yemas y mezcla
To the cheese mix add milk, melted butter, vanilla and lemon grates
Integra bien todos los ingredientes con una batidora de mano
Add the steamed dry ingredients to avoid clumps
Mezcla bien con la batidora de mano
A little by little adds an egg clear and removes with the help of a spatula in wrapped movements
In a frying frying pan with butter put some of the mixture and accommodate a few cranberries onto your hot cake
Cuando comiencen a formarse burbujitas es momento de voltearlos
Haz esto con el resto de la masa
Disfruta

red-fruit-sauce-recipe-comedera.name: Red Fruit Sauce Recipe
red-fruit-sauce-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de salsa de frutos rojos

ingredients.item: ½ kg of different red fruit (strawberries, raspberries, moors, cranberries)

instructions: Retiro and remove from them any seed (for cherries). Put them in a medium pot with a glass of Red Wine and some water, enough to cover the Red fruits slightly.
Add vinegar, sugar and cinnamon powder and a very small pint of salt.
Pon a fuego medio la olla y deja que se cocine todo durante 15-20 minutos.
Taste it with flavour, if you need some extra sugar, you get to do that.
Retira del fuego y pasa la salsa por una trituradora hasta conseguir una textura cremosa a tu antojo.
Let her stand and that's it.

red-posole-with-pork.name: Red Posole With Pork

ingredients.prep: halved through root end, plus chopped for serving
thinly sliced radishes, dried oregano, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Place pork shoulder, onion halves, garlic, bay leaf, and cloves in a large pot. Pour in 14 cups water (pork should be submerged). Bring to a simmer and cook, skimming as needed and turning pork occasionally, until meat is cooked through and tender but not yet falling apart, 2½–3 hours. Transfer pork to a plate; let cool slightly. Strain broth into a large bowl, then transfer back to pot. Slice pork into ½" slices and add to broth.

Meanwhile, preheat oven to 350°. Toast all the chiles on a rimmed baking sheet until brown (do not char) and starting to lightly puff in places, about 5 minutes. Bring 3 cups water to a boil in a medium saucepan; add chiles. Remove from heat and let chiles soak until softened, 10–12 minutes. Blend chiles and cooking liquid in a blender until smooth; season with salt.
Add chile purée to pork and broth. Bring to a simmer, add hominy, and cook, skimming off fat from surface, until pork is so tender it’s nearly falling apart, 45–60 minutes; season with more salt.
Divide posole among bowls, top with onion, cabbage, radishes, and oregano. Serve with lime wedges.
Do Ahead: Posole can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

red-sangria-with-herbs-and-citrus.name: Red Sangria With Herbs And Citrus

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, thinly sliced crosswise, seeds removed
halved lengthwise, thinly sliced crosswise, seeds removed, plus more slices for serving
halved lengthwise, thinly sliced crosswise, seeds removed, plus more slices for serving
such as Pierre Ferrand dry Curaçao

instructions: Heat sugar and ¾ cup water in a small saucepan over medium-high, stirring to dissolve sugar. Let simple syrup cool.

Place thyme sprigs, rosemary, lime slices, slices from 2 oranges and 2 lemons, 10 mint sprigs, and 4 star anise pods in a large bowl; pour in brandy, liqueur, and vermouth. Chill base at least 4 hours and up to 12 hours (longer is better).

Strain base through a fine-mesh sieve into a large pitcher filled with ice, pressing on solids. Stir in wine and 1 cup simple syrup. Garnish with more orange slices, lemon slices, mint sprigs, and star anise. Chill at least 1 hour before serving. Serve sangria in ice-filled glasses.
Do Ahead: Base can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

refreshing-brazilian-lemonade.name: Refreshing Brazilian Lemonade
instructions: Combine water and limes in a blender; blend until smooth. Strain mixture through a strainer into a bowl; discard solids. Pour lime mixture into blender. Add condensed milk, ice, and sugar; blend until combined.

refrigerator-cookie-argiro.name: Refrigerator Cookie

ingredients.item: 250 grating milk 35% beaten in a viscous form
2 tablespoons of soft butter or margarine
250 grating milk 35% beaten in a viscous form
2 tablespoons of soft butter or margarine

instructions: Beat the cold milk cream in a bowl first for 2 minutes with a hand mixer.
Add the peanut butter.
Allow the cream to stand for 5′ and add the whitewashed cream in nick form.
Gently fold the mixture.
In a square baking pan, set a row of pots to cover the entire base of the baking pan.
Spread half the cream on a layer.
Cover with a layer of banana slices.
We're doing another layer of cookies.
Spread the rest of the cream and the remaining bananas.
Finally, cover with a layer of potty ber and spread all the chocolate coating.
Freeze for 4-5 hours or one night.

rib-eye-in-the-pan-with-butter-sauce-arg.name: Rib Eye In The Pan With Butter Sauce
rib-eye-in-the-pan-with-butter-sauce-arg.original_name: Rib eye στο τηγάνι με σάλτσα βουτύρου
instructions: We ask the butcher for the rib eye to be about 3-4 cm thick.
Dry the beef very well with kitchen paper.
Place it on the grill and salt it on both sides. Rub the salt on the surface.
Allow to stand at room temperature from 30’ to 1 hour. When you see animation on the surface after about 30’-40’ then it is ready for cooking.
With absorbent paper we wipe our meat very well.
Place a tandem pan, preferably, on high heat. Let the pan burn well.
Add the oil and add the meat to the hot pan.
Allow for 30 seconds to brown well and turn over.
We continue to make it overturning often every minute for about 4’. We want to achieve a pink crust around the calf pie.
Then lower the heat to medium. Add the butter, thyme and garlic. The butter melts immediately.
After 1 minute remove the garlic.
With a spoon, pour the meat into the pan around, with the juices of the frying pan giving it aromas divinely.
Turn over the meat by pouring it continuously with a spoon, with the butter and the liquids of the pan. It is cooked medium when it shows the temperature reading reaches 54oC.
We beat it and cover it for 5’-6’ to rest. This stage is necessary if you want juicy step.
Place it on a serving plate and cut it. Serve immediately with season salad or grilled vegetables or with potatoes a la cream (dauphinoise).
It fits perfectly with the mustard sauce with honey.

rib-eye-t-bone-and-strip-steaks-cut-over.name: Rib-eye, T-bone, And Strip Steaks Cut Over One Inch

ingredients.prep: T-bone, and/or strip steaks cut over 1"

ingredients.item: Finely chopped savory herbs such as rosemary
Sea or kosher salt to taste
Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Generously season the steaks with salt and pepper. Press in the seasoning, and dab the meat onto the board to collect any excess.
Glisten the meat with canola oil, using the first steak to brush oil onto the others.
Preheat the BBQ to medium-high.
Combine the baste ingredients in a foil pan or heatproof pan and warm on the side of the grill.
Put the meat on the well-oiled grill and cook until medium-rare (or cook to desired doneness).
Baste regularly, stacking and/or flipping the meat if the flames get out of control.

When the steaks are nicely caramelized and charred on both sides, approximately 15 to 25 minutes total, they are done. (You can check the temp with an instant-read thermometer if that is more comfortable; the steaks should register 52°C).
Combine the board dressing ingredients.
Let the steaks rest for 2 minutes, then pour the board dressing onto a cutting board and slice the steaks, turning to coat the slices.

*When steaks come off the grill looking all charred and gorgeous, it'll be tough to resist digging in right away. But letting them rest is essential. Otherwise, a lot of the lovely, tasty juices will spill out when you slice in.

rice-noodles-al-pomodoro-with-chili-oil.name: Rice Noodles Al Pomodoro With Chili Oil

ingredients.item: Chili oil and toasted sesame seeds

instructions: Bring a large saucepan of salted water to a boil. Remove from heat; add noodles. Let sit, stirring occasionally, until al dente, about 4 minutes (time may vary by brand). Drain and rinse under cold running water.

Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium. Cook garlic, stirring often, until softened and golden, about 3 minutes. Add chile and basil sprigs; cook, stirring, just until softened, about 1 minute. Add tomatoes and 1/4 cup water and cook, stirring occasionally, until most of the tomatoes have burst and are jammy, 8–10 minutes. Season with salt.
Add noodles to sauce and toss to coat. Season with more salt if needed. Divide among bowls; drizzle with chili oil and top with sesame seeds and torn basil.

risotto-with-frozen-mussels-argiro.name: Risotto With Frozen Mussels
instructions: We can easily use frozen clams. Remove them from the bag and leave them in the refrigerator storage from nightfall in a colander to thaw properly.
Clean the shrimps (leave the head).
Heat the olive oil in a plate pot and sauté the onion for 3 minutes, stirring.
Add the garlic, pepper and let them wither for a few minutes.
Then pour the rice and the turmeric and mix well.
Drop the broth.
Add salt and pepper and lower the heat.
Cover with lid and simmer for about 10 minutes.
Add raw seafood to the surface, entering the materials.
Cover and simmer for another few minutes until the shrimps change color.
Sprinkle parsley immediately with lemon slices and a little tahini on each plate.
You can add beans and whatever vegetables you like.

roast-chicken-with-broccoli-rabe-fingerl.name: Roast Chicken With Broccoli Rabe, Fingerling Potatoes, And Garlic-parsley Jus

ingredients.prep: large deposits of fat removed, heart and gizzard reserved

ingredients.item: Fingerling potatoes or baby yukon gold potatoes

instructions: Sprinkle chicken all over with 2 teaspoons coarse kosher salt. Place chicken, breast side up, on rack set in roasting pan. Refrigerate uncovered overnight.

Place parsley sprigs and 1/2 lemon in chicken cavity. Tie legs together. Place reserved heart and gizzard and garlic cloves under rack in roasting pan. Drizzle 2 teaspoons oil over chicken breast. Let stand at room temperature 30 minutes.

Position 1 rack in bottom third and 1 rack in center of oven; preheat to 204°C. Place broccoli rabe and potatoes in large bowl; sprinkle with salt and pepper. Add 1/4 cup oil; toss to coat. Transfer vegetables to large rimmed baking sheet and spread out in even layer.

Roast chicken on center oven rack 25 minutes. Add 3/4 cup broth to pan with chicken and place potatoes and broccoli on lower oven rack. Roast chicken until instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of thigh registers 74°C, adding more broth by 1/4 cupfuls if pan is dry, 45 to 55 minutes longer. Let rest 15 minutes.

Continue roasting vegetables until potatoes are tender and slightly browned and broccoli rabe stems are crisp-tender and leaves are crisp but not browned, tossing occasionally, about 10 minutes longer. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Tent with foil to keep warm.

Tilt chicken to allow juices from cavity to pour into roasting pan. Discard heart and gizzard. Strain pan juices into heatproof measuring cup, pressing on solids to force garlic through strainer into cup. Spoon fat from surface of juices. Add wine to pan juices. Return mixture to roasting pan. Stir over medium heat until jus is heated through, scraping up browned bits, about 1 minute. Squeeze enough juice from second lemon half to measure 2 teaspoons; add to jus. Stir in chopped parsley. Season jus to taste with salt and pepper.
Carve chicken; divide among plates. Spoon potatoes and broccoli rabe alongside. Drizzle jus over chicken and serve.

roast-chicken-with-kimchi-smashed-potato.name: Roast Chicken With Kimchi Smashed Potatoes

ingredients.item: Lb. fingerling or baby yukon gold potatoes
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Toss potatoes and 1 Tbsp. oil on a large rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Roast, turning once, until browned in spots, 10–15 minutes.
Meanwhile, rub chicken with garlic and season with salt and pepper. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken skin side down until golden brown and crisp, 8–10 minutes.
Arrange chicken skin side up on baking sheet among potatoes. Roast until chicken is cooked through and potatoes are tender, 15–20 minutes longer.
Using a large spoon, lightly smash potatoes. Scatter kimchi over; roast until kimchi is warm, about 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk reserved kimchi liquid, vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl.
Scatter greens over, drizzle with half of dressing, and toss gently. Divide among plates and drizzle with remaining dressing.

roasted-beet-goat-cheese-and-fennel-sala.name: Roasted Beet, Goat Cheese And Fennel Salad
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (205 degrees C).
Scrub beets; wrap each beet in aluminum foil and place on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until a knife can easily be inserted into beets, about 1 1/2 hours.
Meanwhile, whisk lemon juice, shallot, Dijon mustard, lemon zest, and honey together in a medium bowl. Slowly whisk in 1/3 cup olive oil in a steady stream. Cover and set aside.
Cool beets until able to handle, about 20 minutes. Remove and discard foil. Trim off stems and root ends; peel and cut into 1-inch pieces.
Combine beets, 3 tablespoons vinaigrette, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper in a bowl.
Combine fennel, 3 tablespoons vinaigrette, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper in a separate bowl.
Line 8 salad plates with lettuce; drizzle with remaining vinaigrette. Layer on beets, fennel, goat cheese, walnuts, and chives.

roasted-beets-with-hazelnut-vinaigrette-.name: Roasted Beets With Hazelnut Vinaigrette And Burrata

ingredients.item: Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
-oz. rounds of burrata or fresh mozzarella

instructions: Combine vinegar, lemon juice, and shallot in a small bowl. Stir in mustard. Gradually whisk in oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Preheat oven to 375°. Toss beets with oil in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper. Transfer to a 13x9x2" baking dish, cover tightly with foil, and roast beets until tender (a toothpick should slide through easily), about 40 minutes. Uncover (careful of the steam); let stand until cool enough to handle, about 10 minutes. Peel beets (use a paper towel to help rub off the peel), then quarter them. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Toss beets with 1/4 cup vinaigrette in a medium bowl. Arrange burrata on a serving plate. Season with salt and pepper. Top burrata with beets; drizzle remaining vinaigrette from bowl over. Garnish with basil and hazelnuts.

roasted-pickles-recipe-lezzet.name: Roasted Pickles Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 medium size onion (fived in the form of a month)

instructions: 1. Fresh bean pickled çIf it is salty, short time waiting in water filter.
2. Heat the olive oil and butter together in a large pan.
3. Add chopped onions, roast until pink in the middle fire.
4. Add pepper to the container and soak up to the minute softener.
5. Add hazelnut and mix the smell & the short time until the smell of fr
6. Get fresh beans pickled in the pan, roast 5–7 minutes together with all materials.
7. Add paprika, if necessary, add less salt and mix.
8. Cover the gold of the furnace and serve as hot.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

roasted-vegetable-and-kale-lasagna.name: Roasted Vegetable And Kale Lasagna
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Preheat the oven to 230 degrees C. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.'}

{'step': '2', 'description': 'Toss red bell pepper, yellow bell pepper, zucchini, mushrooms, and 4 tablespoons olive oil together in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper. Transfer vegetables to the prepared baking sheet in a single layer.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Roast in the preheated oven for about 10 minutes. Turn vegetables and roast 10 to 15 minutes more.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Meanwhile, bring water to a boil in a saucepan. Add torn kale and cook until just darkened in color, about 1 minute. Drain.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Heat remaining olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute. Add drained kale and cook until wilted, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove from heat.'}
{'step': '6', 'description': 'Remove bell peppers from the oven and adjust oven temperature to 190 degrees C.'}

{'step': '7', 'description': 'Layer pasta sauce, lasagna noodles, roasted bell pepper mixture, and grated mozzarella cheese into a 9x13-inch baking pan. Add another layer of noodles, pasta sauce, kale, and sliced bocconcini cheese. Continue layers until ingredients are used up, being sure to place noodle layers and sauce next to each other to prevent dry noodles.'}
{'step': '8', 'description': 'Bake lasagna in the hot oven until bubbling and noodles are soft, about 45 minutes. Let cool 20 to 30 minutes before serving.'}

roasted-winter-squash-seeds-buffalo-hot-.name: Roasted Winter Squash Seeds Buffalo Hot Wings-style
instructions: Preheat oven to 135°C (135 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
Stir seeds, butter, and cayenne pepper sauce together in a bowl to coat the seeds completely; spread onto prepared baking sheet.
Roast seeds to desired crispness, 30 to 45 minutes; cool completely on baking sheet before serving.

robins-egg-place-card.name: Robin's-egg Place Card

ingredients.prep: one for each place card, clean and dry
in a size that will spell the desired name on the egg

instructions: Paint the egg blue: Place it on a skewer, angling so the top of the skewer supports the egg. Use the paintbrush to cover the entire surface of the egg with blue paint. Insert the skewer into the block of Styrofoam (see tip, below) and allow the paint to dry completely—this usually takes about 5 minutes.

Spatter the egg: In separate containers, dilute the brown and white paints with water. If you wish, cover your worktable with newspaper. Arrange the egg on the skewer in the Styrofoam. Dip the paintbrush in the brown paint, hold it in one hand above the egg and run your thumb along the bristles or tap the handle to create a spray of paint. Revolve the egg to splatter the entire surface. Let the paint dry completely, then repeat the process with the white paint. Let the paint dry completely.
Cut out the transfer letters so you can apply them individually.
One at a time and working very gently, apply each letter to the egg, rub over the acetate with a crafts stick or side of a pencil tip to transfer the design, and then discard the acetate.
Place the egg in the nest and tuck a few feathers around it.

rosemary-trout-with-cherry-tomato-salsa.name: Rosemary Trout With Cherry-tomato Salsa

ingredients.item: Finely chopped fresh rosemary plus 8 large sprigs

ingredients.prep: gutted, boned, heads removed, if desired

instructions: Mix tomatoes, shallot, vinegar, and chopped rosemary in bowl. Stir in 1 tablespoon oil. Season sauce with salt and pepper.
Open trout like book on work surface. Sprinkle with coarse salt and pepper. Place 2 rosemary sprigs on each; fold over to close.

Divide 3 tablespoons oil between 2 large nonstick skillets. Place over medium-high heat. Add 2 trout to each skillet. Cook trout until brown outside and just opaque in center, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer to plates. Spoon sauce alongside.

rum-cake-with-sticky-maple-glaze-and-coc.name: Rum Cake With Sticky Maple Glaze And Coconut

ingredients.item: Nonstick vegetable oil spray or unsalted butter
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Whipped coconut cream or creamwith finely grated lime zest and/or ground cherries or fresh berries

instructions: Place a rack in upper third of oven and preheat to 350°. Generously coat pan with nonstick spray, then dust with flour, tapping out excess. Whisk pudding mix, baking powder, baking soda, salt, allspice, and 3 cups (375 g) flour in a medium bowl to combine.

Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat butter in a large bowl until light and smooth, about 1 minute. Gradually add brown sugar, mixing to combine after each addition; beat until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes. Add eggs, oil, rum, and vanilla and beat until incorporated.

Reduce speed to low and gradually add dry ingredients in 2 additions, beating just until combined after each addition and scraping down sides of bowl as needed (be careful not to overmix). Scrape batter into prepared pan and smooth surface.

Bake cake until golden brown and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 50—55 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan 10 minutes. Turn cake out onto rack, loosening with a small offset spatula if needed and let cool completely.
Meanwhile, toast coconut in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and crisp, 8–10 minutes. Let cool.
Bring rum, maple syrup, and butter to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat and cook until thick enough to coat a spoon, about 8 minutes. Transfer glaze to a small bowl.
Transfer cake to a large plate. Drizzle glaze over and sprinkle coconut on top.
Cut cake into slices and serve topped with whipped coconut cream with lime and/or ground cherries if desired.

russian-tomato-salad-bruschetta.name: Russian Tomato Salad Bruschetta

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mix garlic and olive oil in a small bowl and let sit for about 1 hour, or until needed.

Mix the yogurt and sour cream together in a bowl until combined. Add the onions and tomatoes and toss until well coated. Season with salt, freshly ground black pepper, and cayenne. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill in a refrigerator until needed.
Preheat a charcoal grill until coals are white and ashy.
Grill bread over hot charcoal, rotating as needed, until both sides are nicely toasted and slightly charred.

Brush grilled bread with the garlic olive oil and use a slotted spoon to transfer the tomato salad over top of each. Excess dressing can be spooned over if desired. Garnish with chives and serve immediately.

rustic-fruit-galette.name: Rustic Fruit Galette
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a baking sheet.

Combine apples, sugar, cornstarch, cinnamon, and vanilla extract together in a bowl. Place pie crust on the prepared baking sheet. Spoon apple mixture into the center of crust, leaving a 2-inch border. Fold crust over the edges of the apple mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until apples are tender and crust is golden, about 30 minutes.
